user.title: Add Counter
user.description: Create a new counter. Choose a name and select the entity domain to filter the trigger entity.

first_trigger.title: Select Trigger Entity
first_trigger.description: Select the entity and state that will increment the counter.

another_trigger.title: Add Another Trigger
another_trigger.description:
Define an additional trigger for this counter.
Already configured: {previous_triggers}

finish.title: Finalize Counter
finish.description:
Select how triggers should be combined and optionally assign an area.
Total triggers: {count}

done.title: Counter Created
done.description: The counter {name} with {count} trigger(s) has been added successfully.

init.title: Manage Counters
init.description: Add, edit, or remove counters used by this integration.

user.title: Counter Name
user.description: Enter a name for the new counter.

trigger_domain.title: Select Entity Type
trigger_domain.description: Choose the entity domain to filter the trigger entity.

trigger_entity.title: Select Trigger Entity
trigger_entity.description: Select the entity that will trigger the counter.

trigger_state.title: Select Trigger State
trigger_state.description: Enter the state that will increment the counter.

select_edit.title: Edit Counter
select_edit.description: Select the counter you want to edit.

edit_trigger_domain.title: Select Entity Type
edit_trigger_domain.description:
Editing counter: {counter_name}

Choose the entity domain to filter the trigger entity.

edit_trigger_entity.title: Edit Trigger Entity

edit_trigger_state.title: Edit Trigger State

select_delete.title: Delete Counter
select_delete.description: Select the counter you want to delete.

confirm_delete.title: Confirm Deletion
confirm_delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this counter?
